name: Bulk Action Intent
summary: Fan out one command across an N-item selection — the contextual action-bar pattern (select rows, a bar appears, 'Delete 12'). Composes Selection (the live target set) + Command (the action) over a target collection; the net-new residual it owns is the fan-out across the selection, the select-all `matching` predicate, the per-target partial-failure outcome, the 'N selected' aria-live count, and post-action focus return. Ratified #1423; WE owns the intent, FUI the behavior block. Apply/rollback mechanics delegate to a future optimistic-mutation home (#1395-style); bulk-action only NAMES the partial-failure contract.

scope.description: Which targets a select-all spans. `visible` (default, accident-protected) = only the rows currently realized/visible; `matching` is the author opt-in carrying a predicate (e.g. 'all 4,210 rows matching this filter', beyond the DOM). Mandating one is broken under most-flexible-default, so the axis is exposed with the safe default.

onPartialFailure.description: How the fan-out reports a per-target outcome when some targets fail. `continue-and-report` (default) runs every target and reports the per-target success/fail set (the contextual bar shows 'X done, Y failed'); `abort-on-first` stops at the first failure. bulk-action only NAMES this contract — the apply/rollback mechanics delegate to the optimistic-mutation home (#1395).

description:
What this is

The contextual action-bar pattern: select N items, a bar appears, fire one command across all of them ("Delete 12", "Archive 30"). It composes the Selection intent (the live target set) and the Command intent (the action) over a target collection — it does not redefine either. Realizing build for the ratified #1423 placement.

The residual it owns

What no neighbor carries (so a toolbar+selection assemblerPreset can't cover it): the fan-out across the live selection set, the select-all matching predicate (beyond the visible DOM), the per-target partial-failure outcome, the "N selected" aria-live="polite" count, and post-action focus return (focus moves to a stable anchor when the acted-on rows leave the DOM).

Scope — visible vs matching

scope: visible (default) acts only on realized rows — accident-protected. scope: matching is the author opt-in: a predicate selects every row matching a filter, even unrealized ones (the "select all 4,210" affordance), with a mixed header state and an explicit clear.

Partial failure

A fan-out over N targets may partly fail. This intent names the per-target success/fail contract (onPartialFailure) and the bar reports it; it delegates the apply/rollback mechanics (optimistic write, revert) to the mutation home (#1395), never re-implementing them here.

Composition

Selection (target set) + Command (the action) + the #1409 toolbar bar (the surface) + Live Region Status (the count announce). FUI ships the behavior block that binds the bar to the live selection set (#1462).
